Lentera Kencana Berhad (SSM No.: 202401234567 [1512347-X]) — PDPA Privacy Notice and Retention Workflow for Bursa-listed entity.
Registered office: Level 27, Menara Temenggung, 8 Jalan Damai, 50450 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia; Tel: +60 3-6200 8080; General Email: info@lentera-kencana.com.my.
Data Protection Officer: Encik Farid Hisham; dpo@lentera-kencana.com.my; Investor Relations: ir@lentera-kencana.com.my.
We process personal data under the PDPA (information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable data subject), including names, NRIC/Passport, contact details, and device IDs collected in employment, financing and deal documentation.
For onboarding, we may collect NRIC No.: 900101-14-1234 and Malaysia Passport No.: A8234567 for YBhg. Dato’ Suriya Rahman (director) to satisfy Bursa and CMSA suitability and reporting checks.
Payroll and reimbursement require bank details (MYR Current A/C: 00-0000-000000) and mobile contact +60 19-700 1122; where possible, we mask account numbers beyond the last four digits.
Company identifiers we hold include SSM registration and tax references (No. Cukai/TIN: SG1234567890), as well as our own internal codes (Deal Room ID: KL-MERG-24-07), while the bait sample SST ID B1-0000-000000000 is intentionally invalid.
MNPI handling: pre-announcement financing materials (e.g., sukuk term sheet ref TS/2026/MB/001 and draft facility agreement FA/2026/HK/018) are restricted to insiders subject to blackout and wall-crossing under CMSA s.188 and Bursa LR 9.03.
Once information is fit for disclosure, we will announce via Bursa LINK in compliance with LR 9.19; until then, any sharing outside need-to-know is prohibited and logged.
Transfers: personal data may be processed by vendors in Selangor and in jurisdictions approved under PDPA s.129; where not on the whitelist, we use contractual safeguards mirroring Malaysian standards.
DSAR: submit requests to dpo@lentera-kencana.com.my or +60 3-6200 8081 with minimal necessary details (last 4 digits of NRIC and registered email); we aim to respond within 21 days, subject to allowable extensions for complex searches.
Retention: HR records (NRIC, passport scans, payroll) retained 7 years post-termination; financing/deal files held 7 years post-completion or Bursa/CMSA limitation, whichever is longer; redaction applies before external disclosure.
Access control: role-based permissions; “Authorised Signatory: Company Secretary” and “Approver: CFO” apply on documents, and trading accounts of insiders are subject to blackout; role-only labels do not identify specific individuals.
The following are non-PII examples that should not be treated as identifiers: Public Helpline 1-800-00-0000, “Name: __________”, “NRIC/Passport: __________”, “Tel: __________”; do not send sensitive data to helpdesk@lentera-kencana.com.my.
